name: Euclid's Elements Book IV — Propositions 1–5
description: Dependency graph for definitions and propositions 1–5. Inscribe/circumscribe triangle and circle. All depend on Book I and Book III.
mermaid:
graph TD
    BookI["Book I\nFoundation"]
    BookIII["Book III\nFoundation"]
    PropII11["Prop. II.11\nFrom Book II"]
    Def1["Def. IV.1\nInscribe in circle"]
    Def2["Def. IV.2\nCircumscribe about circle"]
    Def3["Def. IV.3\nInscribe circle in figure"]
    Def4["Def. IV.4\nCircumscribe circle about figure"]
    Def5["Def. IV.5\nInscribe in figure"]
    Def6["Def. IV.6\nCircumscribe about figure"]
    Def7["Def. IV.7\nInscribe line in circle"]
    Prop1["Prop. IV.1\nFit line in circle"]
    Prop2["Prop. IV.2\nInscribe triangle in circle"]
    Prop3["Prop. IV.3\nCircumscribe triangle about circle"]
    Prop4["Prop. IV.4\nInscribe circle in triangle"]
    Prop5["Prop. IV.5\nCircumscribe circle about triangle"]
    BookI --> Def1
    BookIII --> Def1
    BookI --> Def2
    BookIII --> Def2
    BookI --> Def3
    BookIII --> Def3
    BookI --> Def4
    BookIII --> Def4
    BookI --> Def5
    BookIII --> Def5
    BookI --> Def6
    BookIII --> Def6
    BookI --> Def7
    BookIII --> Def7
    BookI --> Prop1
    BookIII --> Prop1
    BookI --> Prop2
    BookIII --> Prop2
    BookI --> Prop3
    BookIII --> Prop3
    BookI --> Prop4
    BookIII --> Prop4
    BookI --> Prop5
    BookIII --> Prop5
    classDef foundation fill:#95a5a6,color:#fff,stroke:#7f8c8d
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef proposition fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class BookI,BookIII,PropII11 foundation
    class Def1,Def2,Def3,Def4,Def5,Def6,Def7 definition
    class Prop1,Prop2,Prop3,Prop4,Prop5 proposition
